pids.name: NOx Sensor Corrected
pids.description: Corrected NOx sensor signal (B1S1/S2, B2S1/S2). Includes all learned adaptions and offsets. 1 ppm/bit, 0~65535 ppm. 2016 MY+ engines with NOx sensors may require this in addition to raw PID $83. Bits 4-7 of A indicate data availability (1 = no fault but no results; data reports $FFFF).
pids.description_zh: 校正后NOx传感器信号（组1传感器1/2，组2传感器1/2）。包含所有学习自适应和偏移量。1 ppm/位，0~65535 ppm。2016年及以后带NOx传感器的发动机可能需要此PID作为原始PID $83的补充。A字节位4-7指示数据可用性（1=无故障但无结果；数据报告$FFFF）。

items.label: NOXC_SUP
items.name: Support of NOx Sensor Corrected Data
items.name_zh: NOx传感器校正数据支持

items.name_zh: NOx传感器校正浓度 组1传感器1

items.name: NOx Sensor Corrected Concentration B1S2
items.name_zh: NOx传感器校正浓度 组1传感器2

items.name: NOx Sensor Corrected Concentration B2S1
items.name_zh: NOx传感器校正浓度 组2传感器1

items.label: NOXC22
items.name: NOx Sensor Corrected Concentration B2S2
items.name_zh: NOx传感器校正浓度 组2传感器2

bits.name_zh: NOx校正组1传感器1数据可用性

bits.name: NOxC B1S2 data availability
bits.name_zh: NOx校正组1传感器2数据可用性

pids.name: Cylinder Fuel Rate
pids.description: Calculated amount of fuel injected into the cylinder for combustion during the most recent intake stroke. 0.03125 mg/stroke per bit, 0~2047.97 mg/stroke. Zero when engine not running.
pids.description_zh: 最近一次进气冲程中喷入气缸用于燃烧的计算燃油量。0.03125 mg/冲程/位，0~2047.97 mg/冲程。发动机未运行时为零。

items.label: CYL_RATE
items.name: Cylinder Fuel Rate
items.name_zh: 气缸燃油速率

pids.name: Evap System Vapor Pressure
pids.description: Evaporative system vapor pressure from sensors in fuel tank or vapor line. Two sensors (A/B) with two ranges each: standard (0.25 Pa/bit signed, ±8192 Pa) and wide range (2 Pa/bit signed, ±65536 Pa). Not allowed to support same sensor with two ranges.
pids.description_zh: 来自燃油箱或蒸气管路传感器的蒸发系统蒸气压力。两个传感器（A/B）各有两个量程：标准（0.25 Pa/位有符号，±8192 Pa）和宽量程（2 Pa/位有符号，±65536 Pa）。不允许同一传感器使用两个量程。

items.label: EVAP_VP_SUP
items.name: Support of Evap System Vapor Pressure
items.name_zh: 蒸发系统蒸气压力支持

items.label: EVAP_A_VP
items.name: Evap System Vapor Pressure A
items.name_zh: 蒸发系统蒸气压力A

items.label: EVAP_A_VP_WR
items.name: Evap System Vapor Pressure A (wide range)
items.name_zh: 蒸发系统蒸气压力A（宽量程）

items.label: EVAP_B_VP
items.name: Evap System Vapor Pressure B
items.name_zh: 蒸发系统蒸气压力B

items.label: EVAP_B_VP_WR
items.name: Evap System Vapor Pressure B (wide range)
items.name_zh: 蒸发系统蒸气压力B（宽量程）

bits.name: Evap Vapor Pressure A (wide range) supported
Evap Vapor Pressure B (wide range) supported

pids.name: Transmission Actual Gear
pids.description: Byte B bits 4-7: actual gear (4-bit, 0=neutral, 1-15=gear). Bytes C,D: gear ratio (0.001/bit, 0~65.535, ratio of input to output shaft speed).
pids.description_zh: 字节B位4-7：实际挡位（4位，0=空挡，1-15=挡位）。字节C,D：齿轮比（0.001/位，0~65.535，输入轴与输出轴转速之比）。

items.label: GEAR_SUP
items.name: Transmission Actual Gear Status Supported
items.name_zh: 变速器实际挡位状态支持

items.label: GEAR_ACT_BYTE
items.name: Transmission Actual Gear (byte B)
items.name_zh: 变速器实际挡位（字节B）

items.label: GEAR_RAT
items.name: Transmission Actual Gear Ratio
items.name_zh: 变速器实际齿轮比

bits.name: Transmission Actual Gear Ratio supported
bits.name_zh: 变速器实际齿轮比支持

pids.name: Diesel Exhaust Fluid Dosing
pids.description: Commanded DEF dosing (0.5%/bit, 0~100%) and DEF usage for the current driving cycle (0.0005 L/bit, 0~32.7675 L). DEF_UCDC resets to zero after engine start on subsequent driving cycle.
pids.description_zh: 指令DEF加注量（0.5%/位，0~100%）和当前驾驶循环的DEF使用量（0.0005 L/位，0~32.7675 L）。DEF_UCDC在后续驾驶循环发动机启动后重置为零。

items.label: DEF_DOSE_SUP
items.name: Support of DEF Dosing Data
items.name_zh: DEF加注数据支持

items.label: DEF_CMD
items.name: Commanded DEF Dosing
items.name_zh: 指令DEF加注量

items.label: DEF_UCDC
items.name: DEF Usage for the Current Driving Cycle
items.name_zh: 当前驾驶循环DEF使用量

bits.name: DEF Usage for Current Driving Cycle supported
bits.name_zh: 当前驾驶循环DEF使用量支持

pids.name: Vehicle Odometer
pids.description: Vehicle odometer reading, 0.1 km/bit, 0~429,496,729.5 km. Reported by single ECU using operator-visible odometer. Updated minimum 1 sec. Continues in key-on/engine-off. Reset only on reprogramming event. Not cleared by scan tool. If unavailable, reports last valid value.
pids.description_zh: 车辆里程表读数，0.1 km/位，0~429,496,729.5 km。由单个ECU使用操作员可见里程表报告。最低1秒更新。钥匙开/发动机关时继续报告。仅在重新编程事件时清零。扫描工具不会清除。不可用时报告最后有效值。

items.label: ODO
items.name: Vehicle Odometer Reading
items.name_zh: 车辆里程表读数

pids.note: Not reset by Service $04 or any scan tool command. Only reset on reprogramming event.

pids.name: NOx Sensor (Sensors 3/4)
pids.description: Raw, uncorrected NOx sensor signal for B1S3/S4, B2S3/S4. 1 ppm/bit, 0~65535 ppm. Corrected signal available via PID $A8. Bits 4-7 of A indicate data availability.
pids.description_zh: 气缸组1传感器3/4、组2传感器3/4的原始未校正NOx传感器信号。1 ppm/位，0~65535 ppm。校正信号通过PID $A8获取。A字节位4-7指示数据可用性。

items.name_zh: NOx传感器数据支持（传感器3/4）

pids.name: NOx Sensor Corrected (Sensors 3/4)
pids.description: Corrected NOx sensor signal for B1S3/S4, B2S3/S4. Includes all learned adaptions and offsets. 1 ppm/bit, 0~65535 ppm. Raw signal via PID $A7. Bits 4-7 of A indicate data availability.
pids.description_zh: 气缸组1传感器3/4、组2传感器3/4的校正后NOx传感器信号。包含所有学习自适应和偏移量。1 ppm/位，0~65535 ppm。原始信号通过PID $A7获取。A字节位4-7指示数据可用性。

pids.name: Motorcycle Input/Output Status
pids.description: Byte A = support bits, Byte B = status. Currently only ABS Disable Switch defined.
pids.description_zh: 字节A=支持位，字节B=状态。目前仅定义ABS禁用开关。
